title: Spicy Prawn Tacos
description: A flavorful and spicy Mexican dish featuring prawns in a zesty sauce, served in tacos with your favorite toppings.
instructions: 1. Rinse the prawns under cold water and pat them dry with a paper towel.
2. In a large bowl, mix together Jamaican Jerk Seasoning, lime juice, and a pinch of salt. Add the prawns and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
3. Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Remove the prawns from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
4. Add the prawns to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they turn pink and are cooked through.
5. Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble the tacos by placing a cooked prawn onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of salsa, a sprinkle of cilantro, and a dollop of sour cream.
7. Serve immediately, with rousing hot sauce on the side for added heat.
8. Garnish with additional cilantro, avocado, and salsa, if desired.
9. Serve the tacos in bowls for a fun and casual meal.
10. Enjoy your delicious Spicy Prawn Tacos!
